title: BetterPvPSprint
description: Client-side Fabric mod that adds toggleable auto sprint with separate land and water controls, a custom keybind category, and automatic sprint handling based on movement, hunger, and environment, including diagonal movement support.
body:
BetterPvPSprint is a lightweight client-side Fabric mod that gives you full control over sprinting in PvP and survival scenarios.
Features:

- Toggle auto-sprint on/off with a keybind (default: Z)
- Separate water sprint toggle (default: V)
- Automatically stops sprinting when hunger is too low (below 7 shanks)
- Diagonal movement detection — sprints correctly when strafing
- Actionbar status messages so you always know your sprint state
- Persistent config — your settings save between sessions
- Zero performance impact
